name: Pre-engineered Metal Building Manufacturers
description:
SAMAN is one of the pre-engineered metal building manufacturers in India that fabricates the complete metal building system in-house — the steel frame and the metal roof and wall cladding are cut, welded, and finished at our own plants in Bangalore and Greater Noida, then delivered to your site. We are the maker, not a trading desk that buys structures in and re-labels them. The configured unit on this page is a 60′×26′×19′ building on a mild steel frame with a PUF sandwich-panel envelope, priced at ₹17,15,000 inclusive of taxes. When you search for a metal building manufacturer, you are really checking one thing — who actually builds the structure you take delivery of. This page answers that, then points you to the right next step.

What makes a company a metal building manufacturer, not a trader?

A metal building manufacturer fabricates the building itself — cutting and welding the steel frame and finishing the metal cladding inside its own factory, with steel traceable to its source and documentation to match. A trader buys those components from other fabricators and re-labels them, so no single party controls the specification of your structure.

Primary frames for a metal building fabricated in-house, with matching navy cladding staged alongside.

That control matters most on a metal building because the structure is really two systems in one — the load-bearing steel frame and the metal roof and wall cladding that closes it in. A maker that fabricates both under one roof can hold them to a single specification, so the frame, the panels, and the fasteners are matched before anything ships. When those parts are bought from different fabricators and assembled by a trader, nothing guarantees they were specified to work together. How you check which one you are dealing with is the next section.

How to evaluate a metal building manufacturer before you order

Most manufacturer pages tell you they are the best; few tell you how to check. Before you commit to any metal building manufacturer in India, confirm these six points:

  • In-house fabrication — is the frame cut and welded at the company's own plant, or sub-contracted? Ask where the factory is.
  • Steel traceability — can the maker trace the primary steel by heat number and provide mill test certificates?
  • Documentation — do you receive structural drawings, a design calculation report, and weld procedure records, or only an invoice?
  • Customisation — are size, height, and opening positions set from your brief before fabrication, or are you fitted into a fixed product?
  • Pricing transparency — is there a clear configured price with a stated reason for what moves it, or only "price on request"?
  • Site honesty — does the maker state the practical conditions (level, accessible ground and a foundation matched to the frame) before you order?

A fabricated frame checked against structural drawings and mill certificates before dispatch.

A genuine maker answers all six without hesitation. SAMAN does: in-house frames from two plants, traceable steel, full documentation, brief-led customisation, a stated price, and the site conditions confirmed up front.

Metal, steel or PEB manufacturer — which page serves you?

"Metal building manufacturer" is one of several near-identical terms buyers use, and SAMAN keeps a separate page for each so you land on the one that fits your decision. If your tender or specification is written in metal-building language — sheds, hangars, lighter envelopes, the metal PEB framing — this manufacturer page is the right one. If your priority is the structural steel grade and IS-standard frame for a load-bearing factory or warehouse, our pre-engineered steel building option covers the steel-specification route. And if you already know the configuration you want and are ready to order a finished building at a set price, our configured metal building product lists the sizes, spans, and cost.

A finished pre-engineered metal building in the standard single-span configuration at an industrial estate.

Same factory, same steel, same bolted assembly — the difference is the language your project uses, and whether you are vetting a maker or ordering a finished unit.

Buying a metal building direct — price and what moves it

Buying direct from the manufacturer means the price you see is the maker's price, with no reseller margin layered on top. The configured 60′×26′×19′ metal building on this page is ₹17,15,000 inclusive of taxes — a reference point, not a flat rate.

PUF sandwich panel beside single-skin cladding — the choice that moves a metal building's price most.

On a metal building the cladding decision is the lever you feel first: a PUF sandwich-panel envelope insulates but costs more than single-skin metal cladding, and that one choice can shift the figure more than anything else. Under it sits steel tonnage — a wider clear span or a taller building needs heavier sections — and then the number of doors, roller shutters, and windows cut into the envelope. As an engineered metal building maker working direct, we hold this pricing because there is no trading layer between the factory and your quote. Share your size and intended use and we quote your exact building rather than a generic figure.

From your spec to dispatch — how an order works

Once your brief is set, the building is fabricated as a complete, factory-made kit and dispatched from whichever of our two plants sits closest to your site, so transport is shorter and the bolt-together assembly is predictable on arrival. It lands on a level, accessible site with a foundation matched to the frame loads — we issue the foundation requirement with the drawings so your civil work runs in parallel rather than after delivery.

A complete metal building kit strapped and labelled on a trailer, dispatched from the nearest plant.

By default we manufacture and supply for your own erection team. If you would rather the structure were erected for you under one contract, that managed service is handled by our turnkey design-and-erection team. To see how this metal building sits within our wider steel-building line, visit the full pre-engineered building range. Tell us your location at enquiry stage and we confirm the lead time and delivery cost before you commit.

Frequently asked questions

Does SAMAN manufacture the metal building, or source it from another fabricator?

We manufacture it. The steel frame and metal cladding are fabricated at our own plants in Bangalore and Greater Noida, not bought in from a third-party fabricator. You deal directly with the team that cuts, welds, and finishes the building you take delivery of.

What is the difference between a metal building manufacturer and a steel building manufacturer?

It is mainly which page fits your enquiry. Search "metal building" and you usually mean a sheet-clad building — a shed, hangar, or lighter industrial envelope. Search "steel building" and you are usually leading with the structural steel grade and IS-standard frame for a heavier, load-bearing factory or warehouse. SAMAN fabricates both at the same plants; this page is for buyers using metal-building language, and the steel-specification page covers the other.

How much does a metal building cost when you buy direct from the maker?

The configured 60′×26′×19′ steel-and-PUF-panel unit is ₹17,15,000 inclusive of taxes. Your figure moves with the cladding you choose, the steel tonnage your span and height call for, and the openings you need — quoted direct, with no reseller margin on top.

Do you erect the metal building on site, or supply it for our own team?

We supply the building as a complete kit for erection by your own team — the standard route for buyers sourcing from a manufacturer. If you need it erected for you, design-supply-and-erect under a single contract is available as a separate managed service.

Get a manufacturer-direct quote

Ready to source direct from the manufacturer? Send your size and site location for a manufacturer-direct quote on your metal building.

Bangalore: Call +91 80886 85440 | WhatsApp +91 88616 22859
Delhi NCR: Call +91 87960 39938 | WhatsApp +91 97089 89937

Pre-engineered metal building manufacturer
60×26×19 ft metal building — frame & cladding made in-house
Complete metal building system fabricated at our Bangalore & Greater Noida plants and supplied direct — no reseller margin. Custom sizes quoted to your brief.
